name: China VAST Industrial Urban Development Company Limited
summary: China VAST Industrial Urban Development Company Limited, an investment holding company, plans, develops, and operates large-scale industrial town projects in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Industrial Towns Development, Property Development, and Property Leasing segments. The company develops residential, commercial, and industrial projects, including residence, apartment, villa, retail stores, and office buildings. It is also involved in the property leasing, infrastructure and project investment, consulting, asset management, and land infrastructure maintenance activities, as well as offers Internet information technology services. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. China VAST Industrial Urban Development Company Limited is a subsidiary of Profit East Limited.
